title: cynoglossum alaicum
intro: Cynoglossum alaicum, also known as Alai Hound's Tongue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and inflammation. The plant's leaves and roots are known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating coughs. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum alaicum is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
